title: UAE Corporate Tax: What Your Business Needs to Know
excerpt: A practical overview of UAE corporate tax rules, thresholds, and compliance steps for businesses operating in Dubai and across the Emirates.
content:
Understanding UAE Corporate Tax

The UAE introduced a federal corporate tax regime that applies to most businesses operating in the country. Understanding the thresholds, exemptions, and filing requirements is essential for staying compliant.

Who needs to register?

Businesses that meet the taxable income threshold must register with the Federal Tax Authority and maintain proper financial records. Free zone entities may qualify for incentives if they meet qualifying activity criteria.

Key compliance steps

  • Determine your tax residency and taxable income
  • Register with the Federal Tax Authority when required
  • Maintain audited financial statements
  • File returns on time and pay any tax due

AL HADI Business Services helps companies assess exposure, prepare documentation, and implement ongoing compliance processes.
author: AL HADI Business Services

title: A Complete Guide to the UAE Golden Visa
excerpt: Learn who qualifies for the UAE Golden Visa, what documents you need, and how the application process works.
content:
What is the Golden Visa?

The UAE Golden Visa offers long-term residency to investors, entrepreneurs, skilled professionals, and outstanding students. It provides stability for families and businesses planning a long-term presence in the UAE.

Common eligibility paths

  1. Property investment
  2. Business ownership and entrepreneurship
  3. Specialised talent and professionals

We guide applicants through eligibility checks, document preparation, and submission so the process stays clear and efficient.
author: AL HADI Business Services

title: Mainland vs Free Zone vs Offshore: Choosing the Right Setup
excerpt: A clear comparison of mainland, free zone, and offshore company structures in the UAE.
content:
Three common company structures

Selecting the right legal structure affects market access, ownership, taxation, and operational flexibility.

StructureBest forKey benefit
MainlandLocal market tradingDirect access to the UAE market
Free zoneInternational and specialised activities100% ownership and incentives
OffshoreHolding and international structuresAsset protection and flexibility

AL HADI helps founders choose a structure aligned with their customers, activities, and growth plans.
author: AL HADI Business Services

title: How to Sponsor Your Family on a UAE Residence Visa
excerpt: Step-by-step guidance on sponsoring your spouse and children for UAE residence visas.
content:
Family sponsorship essentials

Residents who meet salary and housing requirements can sponsor eligible family members. Preparing documents correctly is the fastest way to avoid delays.

Typical requirements

  • Valid residence visa and Emirates ID
  • Salary certificate or employment contract
  • Tenancy contract or ownership proof
  • Attested marriage and birth certificates where applicable

Our PRO team manages applications end to end, from document checks to medical and Emirates ID appointments.
author: AL HADI Business Services

title: VAT Registration in the UAE: Who Needs It and Why
excerpt: Know when VAT registration becomes mandatory and how to prepare your business for compliance.
content:
VAT registration thresholds

Businesses that exceed the mandatory registration threshold for taxable supplies must register for VAT. Voluntary registration is also available in certain cases.

Staying ahead of registration deadlines protects your business from penalties and keeps invoicing compliant.

We support registration, return filing, and advisory for companies entering or expanding in the UAE market.
author: AL HADI Business Services

title: Protecting Your Brand: Trademark Registration in Dubai
excerpt: Why trademark protection matters in the UAE and how the registration process works.
content:
Secure your brand identity

Trademark registration helps protect your name, logo, and brand assets from unauthorised use. Early filing is especially important for businesses entering competitive markets.

Process overview

  1. Search for existing marks

  2. Prepare and file the application

  3. Respond to office actions if needed

  4. Complete publication and registration

AL HADI coordinates filings and follow-ups so your brand protection stays on track.

title: PRO Services Explained: Government Documents Made Simple
excerpt: How professional PRO support streamlines visas, licences, and government paperwork in the UAE.
content:
What PRO services cover

Public Relations Officer (PRO) services handle government-facing paperwork so business owners can focus on operations. This includes visas, labour cards, licence renewals, and document attestation.

Benefits of outsourcing PRO work

  • Faster turnaround with fewer errors
  • Clear tracking of applications
  • Reduced admin burden for your team

AL HADI provides dedicated PRO support tailored to startups and established companies alike.
